message:
fix(build): Use GCC static libraries directly for compiler runtime

libgcc_s.so wasn't working - directly link GCC's static compiler-rt
libraries (libgcc.a and libgcc_eh.a) which provide __addvdi3, __mulvdi3
and other compiler builtins needed by WAMR AOT libraries.

Using explicit paths to GCC 13's libraries on Ubuntu.
